steps.t: You will find barricades to the north-west of Talan Haldir, outside the Orc camps of Uruk-gashan, Drû-garmadh, and Athmadhul, along the road that runs…
Hadroneth is on Talan Haldir, located on the banks of the Nimrodel, south-east of Nanduhirion. You have set fire to many of the Orc barricades in Nand…
